segments.speaker: 题目13/14
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm planning a trip to Europe next month. Great. Make sure to book your accommodations in advance and check for any travel restrictions. That's helpful. What about transportation within cities? When I visited Los Angeles in the United States last year, I had a lot of trouble getting around. Europe is different. Public transportation in most cities there is plentiful and cheap.
